ablation.label: Ablation — palace OFF (same app, plain flashcards)

full.label: Full app — palace ON (method of loci)

ablation_minus_plain.what: what the rest of our app adds over stock Anki

full_minus_ablation.what: the palace feature's own contribution (the ablation)

full_minus_ablation_fact_cards_only.what: same feature, pure fact-recall cards — expected NULL

full_minus_plain.what: whole app vs the obvious alternative

hypothesis: Studying a topic's cards through the AR memory palace (method of loci) will produce higher delayed recall on NEW, reworded questions — at equal study time — than studying the same cards as plain flashcards.
main_number: Mean accuracy on a 48-hour-delayed test of reworded questions, on the studied topics. The decisive comparison is Full (palace ON) minus Ablation (palace OFF); plain Anki is the sanity floor.

builds: Full app — palace ON (method of loci)
Ablation — palace OFF (same app, plain flashcards)

verdict.rule: Full - Ablation >= +0.05 AND its 95% CI excludes 0
